form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Gawler (23.17) in a OPEN, finishing a 9 length fifth. Has seven wins and seven placings from 25 starts from the draw. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after his success on December 23 at this track over 300m. Last start was second over 300m in 17.00, behind Stifler. Top-three hope with the right run.

form.formComment: Finished second (16.95) at this track last time making it three placings in a row. Squeeze draw to overcome. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing third (17.07) at this track. Wide draw here. Looks to have the job ahead.

form.formComment: Has been in a purple patch of form, putting three wins back-to-back. Had plenty of support last start when he won easily by 3.5 lengths at this track (16.75) beating Let's Go Sam in a Invitation on April 8. Flying lately and can score again.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (17.26) at big odds over 300m at this track. Looks safely held.
